segments.text: Neo kept winning neutral and was pulling off lots of different moves, but...
segments.original_text: ステージを獲得し続けたネオがかなりのみのみと技振りを増やすことができましたが

segments.text: Game 3, the stage opens up - Town & City
segments.original_text: 3戦目一気にステージ広くなる村と町

segments.text: 0% close range rally into forward smash, connects perfectly, straight into a 0% KO!
segments.original_text: 0%密着ラリーホーから横スマして会心に出てそのまま0%撃墜

full_text: Neo kept winning neutral and was pulling off lots of different moves, but... Game 3, the stage opens up - Town & City. 0% close range rally into forward smash, connects perfectly, straight into a 0% KO! Ooh!

corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 開始→会心 (critical hit)
